request.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. Please help me get it back.

response.agent_summary: Customer reports a wrong transfer issue (high severity). Matched transaction TXN-9101 (transfer, 5000 BDT to +8801719876543, status completed); transaction evidence is consistent.
response.recommended_next_action: Verify transaction TXN-9101 details with the customer and open a dispute case to attempt a recall from the recipient per the wrong-transfer SOP.
response.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We have noted your concern and our team will investigate this matter promptly. Any eligible amount will be processed through official channels once the review is complete. We will keep you updated through our official support. Reference: TKT-001.
